title: Documentation
description: Find everything you need to get started and master Arrkiii. From initial setup to advanced configurations, our documentation has you covered.

categories.title: Getting Started

categories.title: Music System
categories.description: Detailed guides on using the music commands, managing playlists, and troubleshooting.

categories.title: Moderation
